title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy at high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Involves collaborating with globally distributed teams across time zones, including Finout's Tel Aviv HQ. A strategic, analytical builder mindset is essential.
score_reason: Exceptional match on all core dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, deep Salesforce and revenue analytics expertise aligns perfectly, B2B SaaS background with scaling experience matches the $30M+ ARR context, and Tel Aviv hybrid option eliminates location friction for a Tel Aviv-based candidate.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years scaling RevOps at B2B SaaS companies is exactly what the CRO is looking to build. The hybrid Tel Aviv/NY setup seems designed for someone with your background, and Finout's focus on cloud cost intelligence aligns perfectly with the data-driven, analytics-first mindset you've consistently demonstrated. Would be worth a conversation to explore how you could architect their GTM operations at scale.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Owns territory model design and optimization for global scalability. Partners with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions through quantitative and qualitative analyses, delivers territory assignments, whitespace analysis, and coverage recommendations. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, segmentation strategies, strong Excel/SQL/BI skills (Tableau, Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan are a plus. Salary range $149,000-$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy and GTM optimization directly leverage his senior-level experience, though the role is more specialized/tactical than his typical Head of Revenue Operations scope.
ai_opener: Omri, your 15+ years optimizing GTM models and pipeline forecasting in B2B SaaS caught my attention for Gong's RevOps Manager role—territory strategy is a natural extension of the revenue architecture work you've led. With your Salesforce mastery and track record scaling go-to-market operations, you'd be perfectly positioned to transform Gong's territory model for global scalability.

title: RevOps Manager
description: A builder role owning the technical infrastructure powering Instrumentl's revenue engine. You'll architect the CRM data model, integrate new data sources, and lead technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, Marketing Ops, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong SQL, workflow building, and API skills, hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience. Familiarity with enrichment vendors and intent data providers is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience directly aligns with builder role requiring CRM architecture, data integration, and AI tool implementation. Remote location, HubSpot expertise, and AI-native GTM focus are all ideal fits.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building revenue infrastructure at scale across B2B SaaS, and Instrumentl's approach to architecting CRM data models and integrating AI into sales processes is exactly the kind of technical RevOps work I'm energized by. Your focus on data architecture and enrichment integrations suggests you're building for sophistication—I'd love to explore how my background scaling RevOps systems could accelerate your revenue engine.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: First dedicated RevOps hire to support Flex's New Verticals division, reporting to the Head of Revenue Operations. You'll build and own the Salesforce environment, design revenue tech stack integrations, architect the sales process from lead-to-close, and define core operating metrics. Requires 5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or GTM Operations with 2+ years senior/lead experience, deep Salesforce expertise, and demonstrated experience standing up RevOps infrastructure. Familiarity with Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot. Builder mentality essential.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience far exceeds 5+ year requirement, deep Salesforce expertise aligns perfectly with core responsibility, builder mentality and infrastructure setup experience directly applicable to first dedicated RevOps hire role.
ai_opener: I noticed Flex is scaling its New Verticals division with a first dedicated RevOps hire—exactly the kind of greenfield infrastructure build I've led multiple times. With 15+ years building and optimizing Salesforce-centric revenue stacks in B2B SaaS, including designing lead-to-close processes and defining core metrics that scale revenue predictability, I'd be valuable in getting your systems and processes right from day one.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, scaling 20x in revenue. This role replaces patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows that compound over time. You'll code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations, including lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work. Ideal for someone who makes the GTM team dangerously effective.
score_reason: Perfect alignment with GTM Engineer title, AI-native platform expertise, and RevOps automation focus. Remote location and B2B SaaS scaling context are ideal matches; only minor gap is that this leans slightly more technical/engineering than typical RevOps admin role.
ai_opener: Omri here—15+ years building GTM engines at scale in B2B SaaS. Conveo's approach to replacing manual workflows with purpose-built AI agents resonates deeply; I've spent my career automating exactly what you're describing (lead scoring, attribution, pipeline management). Your 20x growth trajectory and roster of global brands suggests you need someone who can architect RevOps infrastructure that compounds—let's talk about how to make your GTM team dangerously effective.

title: GTM Engineer
description: A systems-building role requiring an enterprise SaaS operations background. Needs 5+ years in rev ops, marketing ops, or sales ops at an enterprise SaaS company and experience running account-based motions. Genuine AI fluency essential: prompting, building small agents, and applying AI daily. High agency, fast pace, and strong bias to action are core.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with demonstrated systems-building expertise, HubSpot fluency, and AI-native GTM focus align perfectly with this enterprise GTM Engineer role. The account-based motion experience and bias-to-action mindset match Gradient Labs' fast-paced, high-agency culture.

title: Director, GTM Tech and Automation
description: AI-first role building, automating, and operating the systems powering Ivo's go-to-market engine, reporting to the VP Revenue Strategy & Operations. Usage-based/consumption revenue model experience valued.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience exceeds 5-10 year requirement, senior-level background aligns with Director scope, Salesforce admin expertise and GTM systems ownership directly match core responsibilities, and AI-native GTM focus is a key strength.
